title: Hiring Store Manager at Dulux Decorator Centre

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Dulux Decorator Centre
jsonLd.description:
We at Dulux Decorator Centre are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dulux Decorator Centre:
Dulux Decorator Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre!
